summary: FAQ feature testing complete: All solution and service pages display dynamic FAQs from database with proper Schema.org JSON-LD markup for Google rich results.

solution_pages_faqs.details: All solution pages display dynamic FAQs from MongoDB with Dubai/UAE-specific pricing and timelines

service_pages_faqs.details: All service pages display dynamic FAQs from MongoDB with Dubai/UAE-specific pricing (AED)

faq_schema_org_markup.details: FAQPage Schema.org JSON-LD correctly injected on all pages. Solution pages use server-side rendering, service pages use useEffect injection.

service_schema_org_markup.details: Service Schema.org JSON-LD present with correct provider (LEXA Lifestyle) and area served (UAE)

fallback_faqs.status: NOT TESTED - All pages have database FAQs
fallback_faqs.details: All 85 solution pages and 10 service pages have FAQs in database, so fallback mechanism was not triggered

faq_schema.mainEntity_structure: Array of Question objects with acceptedAnswer

critical_code_review_comments: Solution pages (page.tsx) use server-side rendering for FAQ Schema injection - good for SEO
Service pages (page.tsx) use client-side useEffect for schema injection - works but less optimal for SEO crawlers
Both implementations correctly handle the faqs array from MongoDB
Fallback FAQs in SolutionClient.tsx provide generic questions if database FAQs are empty

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages display FAQs and Schema correctly)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing FAQs from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: FAQ feature is fully functional. 85 solution pages and 10 service pages have comprehensive FAQs with Dubai/UAE pricing. Schema.org FAQPage markup is correctly implemented for Google rich results.
